title: Armour Durablity Hud
description: Display the durability of all wearable equipment directly on the HUD with customizable positioning and scaling
body:
# Armour Durability HUD

Tired of your armour breaking mid-fight without warning? The **Armour Durability HUD** mod is here to save the day!

This lightweight and powerful mod adds a **customizable HUD** on your screen that shows the durability of every piece of armour you’re wearing – including **helmets, chestplates, leggings, boots, elytra, turtle shells, and more**.

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e81436885d7d199d80ffde632b0895d24a2c72b.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)

---

## 🔑 Key Features

* **On-Screen Armour HUD**
  Always know the condition of your armour without opening the inventory.

* **Durability in Percentage**
  The HUD displays exact percentages, making it easy to decide when to repair or swap gear.

* **Colour-Coded Alerts**

  * 🟢 **Green** = High durability
  * 🟡 **Yellow** = Mid durability
  * 🔴 **Red** = Low durability (time to repair or replace!)

* **Supports All Wearables**
  Works with every vanilla wearable item, from **diamond armour** to **elytra**.

* **Customizable Placement**
  Adjust the HUD position by clicking "O" on keyboard to match your screen layout and preferences.

---

## 🎮 Why Use This Mod?

In Minecraft, losing your armour at the wrong time can mean losing your progress, your loot, or even your hardcore world. This mod gives you **real-time awareness** of your armour’s durability, so you’re never caught off guard. Whether you’re PvPing, exploring dangerous caves, or flying across the skies with an elytra, the Armour Durability HUD keeps you safe.

---

## 📦 Download & Installation

* **Version:** 1.21 (Fabric)
* **Author:** SpunkyInsaan

Just drop the mod file into your `mods` folder, launch Minecraft, and you’re good to go!

---
